title: Open Source Science Initiative Successes and Next Steps
author: Murphy, Kevin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The Office of the Chief Science Data Officer was established to lead an innovative and sustainable program across SMD that will support NASA’s unique science missions and enable groundbreaking discoveries with open scientific data, software, and publications.
steps_raw: The Office of the Chief Science Data Officer was established to lead an innovative and sustainable program across SMD that will support NASA’s unique science missions and enable groundbreaking discoveries with open scientific data, software, and publications.
